name: Crockpot Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sauce, hamburger, shells and mushrooms together.
2. Put half of the mixture in the crockpot.
3. Pour sour cream over this and sliced provolone on top.
4. Sprinkle sliced (or shredded) mozzarella cheese on top.
5. Cook on low for 6-7 hours.
NOTE: This is excellent, great for parties!!!! I have a large crockpot and usually double this recipe and it fits fine.
